feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, OpenRouter, LiteLLM (blog + releases), and Glama MCP Servers

entry.title: July Townhall: Product + Roadmap Updates
entry.content: Join the LiteLLM July townhall on Thursday, 23 July at 7:30 AM PT to learn about LiteLLM's product updates and roadmap.

entry.title: code-modernization
entry.content: Modernize legacy codebases (COBOL, legacy Java/C++/.NET, monolith web apps) with a structured preflight / assess / map / extract-rules / brief / (reimagine | transform | uplift) / harden / status workflow. Cross-stack rewrites, greenfield reimagining, and same-stack version uplifts (e.g. .NET Framework → .NET 8); an interactive topology viewer; specialist agents; and optional dynamic-workflow orchestration with adversarial verification.

entry.title: pm-product-discovery
entry.content: Product discovery skills for PMs: ideation, experiments, assumption testing, feature prioritization, and customer interview synthesis.

entry.title: code-simplifier
entry.content: Agent that simplifies and refines code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability while preserving functionality

entry.title: terraform
entry.content: The Terraform MCP Server provides seamless integration with Terraform ecosystem, enabling advanced automation and interaction capabilities for Infrastructure as Code (IaC) development.

entry.title: clangd-lsp
entry.content: C/C++ language server (clangd) for code intelligence

entry.title: pr-review-toolkit
entry.content: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and code simplification

entry.title: ralph-loop
entry.content: Continuous self-referential AI loops for interactive iterative development, implementing the Ralph Wiggum technique. Run Claude in a while-true loop with the same prompt until task completion.

entry.title: csharp-lsp
entry.content: C# language server for code intelligence

entry.title: mcp-tunnels
entry.content: Connect Claude to a private MCP server through an Anthropic MCP tunnel. Drives the Docker Compose quickstart end to end: certificates, proxy config, cloudflared, and a verifiable sample server.

entry.title: typescript-lsp
entry.content: TypeScript/JavaScript language server for enhanced code intelligence

entry.title: ruby-lsp
entry.content: Ruby language server for code intelligence and analysis

entry.title: pm-execution
entry.content: Execution and product management skills: PRDs, OKRs, roadmaps, sprints, pre-mortems, stakeholder maps, user stories, prioritization frameworks, and more.

entry.content: Go-to-market skills for PMs: GTM strategy, growth loops, GTM motions, beachhead segments, and ideal customer profiles.

entry.title: pm-ai-shipping
entry.content: AI Shipping Kit — for PMs and founders accountable for AI-built code. Document a vibe-coded app, audit it for intended-vs-implemented security gaps and performance issues, and produce a reviewer-ready shipping packet.

entry.title: php-lsp
entry.content: PHP language server (Intelephense) for code intelligence

entry.title: playground
entry.content: Creates interactive HTML playgrounds — self-contained single-file explorers with visual controls, live preview, and prompt output with copy button

entry.title: context7
entry.content: Upstash Context7 MCP server for up-to-date documentation lookup. Pull version-specific documentation and code examples directly from source repositories into your LLM context.

entry.title: pyright-lsp
entry.content: Python language server (Pyright) for type checking and code intelligence

entry.title: skill-creator
entry.content: Create new skills, improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, update or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, or benchmark skill performance with variance analysis.

entry.title: serena
entry.content: Semantic code analysis MCP server providing intelligent code understanding, refactoring suggestions, and codebase navigation through language server protocol integration.

entry.title: asana
entry.content: Asana project management integration. Create and manage tasks, search projects, update assignments, track progress, and integrate your development workflow with Asana's work management platform.

entry.title: math-olympiad
entry.content: Solve competition math (IMO, Putnam, USAMO) with adversarial verification that catches what self-verification misses. Fresh-context verifiers attack proofs with specific failure patterns. Calibrated abstention over bluffing.

entry.content: Laravel development toolkit MCP server. Provides intelligent assistance for Laravel applications including Artisan commands, Eloquent queries, routing, migrations, and framework-specific code generation.

entry.title: imessage
entry.content: iMessage channel for Claude Code — reads chat.db directly, sends via AppleScript. Built-in access control; manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /imessage:access.

entry.title: zetetic-team-subagents
entry.content: 97 genius reasoning patterns from history's greatest minds. One epistemic standard none of them can bypass.

entry.title: domino-autodrive
entry.content: Enforcement layer for autonomous AI coding: tool-layer scope guard, git-committed resumable ledger, converging adversarial challenge gate, and commit-to-requirement traceability. Ships the /domino, /autodrive, /orchestrate, /challenge, and /spec/* commands.

entry.title: rpi
entry.content: RPI workflow: Research, Planning, Implementation. Context engineering system with structured agents and commands for AI-assisted development.

entry.title: grok-subagent
entry.content: grok-subagent

entry.title: frank-grimes
entry.content: A clinical, pessimistic iteration loop implementing Disciplined Falsification Review to find terminal flaws in code, architecture, or designs. Assumes everything is broken until proven otherwise.

entry.title: scott-cc
entry.content: Core development tools with 4 commands, 8 AI agents, 17 skills, 3 hooks, and 3 templates for productive modern web development

entry.title: sdd-workflow
entry.content: A unified plugin supporting AI-driven Specification-Driven Development (AI-SDD) workflow. Prevents Vibe Coding problems and achieves high-quality implementations using specifications as the source of truth. Supports multiple languages via SDD_LANG configuration.

entry.title: rashomon
entry.content: Evaluate prompts and skills through parallel execution comparison in git worktrees. Prompt optimization with BP-001~008 patterns, skill creation/update with quality grading, and blind A/B evaluation.

entry.title: wix
entry.content: Build, manage, and deploy Wix sites and apps. Includes CLI development skills and Wix MCP server for site management, eCommerce, CMS, dashboard extensions, and more.

entry.title: workflows
entry.content: Development, data science, writing, and workshop presentation workflows with TDD enforcement, output-first verification, agent team parallelization, and GSD-style deviation rules, test gap validation, and session handoff.

entry.title: AI-Toolkit
entry.content: Skills for Deep Learning (Keras 3), Reinforcement Learning (Python & C++), Prompt Optimization (Claude Opus 4.8), x402 Web3 Payments, and OpenClaw Setup.

entry.title: kitchen-sink
entry.content: A collection of useful Claude Code skills and commands for software development workflows

entry.content: 開発全般で使える汎用スキル集。コーディング規約、デバッグ手順、リファクタリング指針、コードレビュー観点、テスト戦略をカバー

entry.content: Comprehensive Gleam development skills and tools

entry.content: Warp terminal integration for Claude Code - native notifications, and more to come

entry.title: Orisha Data MCP

entry.title: copilotkit
entry.content: AI agent skills for CopilotKit — setup, develop, integrate, debug, upgrade, and contribute to CopilotKit projects

entry.title: rider-skills
entry.content: JetBrains Rider agent skills for semantic refactoring, debugger-driven runtime analysis, and Unreal Engine C++ authoring, testing, and live debugging.

entry.title: metalama
entry.content: Complete Metalama documentation for aspect-oriented programming and compile-time code generation in C#, covering aspects, T# templates, fabrics, architecture validation, and the Metalama.Patterns libraries (caching, contracts, observability). Use whenever writing, reviewing, or debugging Metalama code; when a build reports LAMA diagnostics or errors point into transformed/generated code; when asked to eliminate repetitive C# (logging, INotifyPropertyChanged, validation, retry, equality, builders) in a project that references Metalama packages; when configuring Metalama MSBuild properties; when testing aspects; or when migrating from PostSharp.

entry.title: waalaxy-copilot
entry.content: Waalaxy AI Copilot: a prospecting copilot with five capabilities — website positioning teardown, scored B2B targets, LinkedIn/Sales Navigator search URLs, LinkedIn profile optimization, and 3-message outreach sequences (plus CSV list cleaning) — with the Waalaxy MCP connector bundled so imports and campaign pushes work out of the box.

entry.title: ditto
entry.content: Ditto's agent integration.

entry.title: agentic-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Agentic Awesome Skills with 1,911 supported skills.

entry.title: agentic-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Agentic Awesome Skills with 1,913 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,444 supported skills.

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: bridge
entry.content: Bridge gstack reviewed plans into Superpowers writing-plans format. Reads a gstack-approved plan, transforms it into a Superpowers-compatible implementation spec, then invokes superpowers:writing-plans.

entry.title: copilotkit
entry.content: AI agent skills for CopilotKit — setup, develop, integrate, debug, upgrade, and contribute to CopilotKit projects

entry.title: palladius-common-commands
entry.content: Riccardo's public Antigravity custom commands, GCP/SRE tools, and agent skills.

entry.title: kevin
entry.content: Talk like Kevin from The Office. Fewest words that carry the meaning. Governs prose only — code, commits, and PRs stay plain.

entry.title: destrier
entry.content: Generic code-improvement toolkit: review/debug skills, knowledgebase session workflow, git hooks, spec-driven development (spec-kit) with brainstorming + feature-to-issue bridges, and a bootstrap for gitnexus + roborev.

entry.title: gustavo-santos-skills
entry.content: Personal agent skills — workflow, engineering, product, design, mobile, communication, meta, operations

entry.title: ram
entry.content: Shared skills and hooks for RAM React/Supabase/Vercel projects

entry.title: green-keeper
entry.content: Keeps your tests and types green while you code — fixes red with minimal changes, maintains behavioral tests, and won't let you walk away from red. No fake-green.

entry.title: drawbar
entry.content: Lean, Linear-native design→plan→work→learn workflow with a per-project compounding knowledge base.

entry.title: exa
entry.content: Exa AI web search, deep research, and content extraction. Provides MCP tools and research skills for comprehensive web search, people discovery, company research, academic papers, and more.

entry.title: voip
entry.content: Make and receive phone calls via agents. Dial numbers, speak messages, hold AI-driven conversations, transcribe calls, and echo speech back over SIP/RTP.

entry.title: tldr
entry.content: Verdict-first communication mode. Cuts output tokens while keeping full technical accuracy.

entry.title: session-recall
entry.content: Shared semantic recall over local Claude Code and Codex session history. Bundles MCP search tools, a deep-recall subagent, a trigger skill, and a background freshness hook.

entry.title: devflow
entry.content: Make agentic coding work on real codebases: DevFlow takes a one-line request to a complete, tested, reviewed, documented PR that's ready for your final review, and improves itself weekly. Includes /devflow:implement (4-phase orchestrator), /devflow:review and /devflow:review-and-fix (a verification-checklist review engine that audits its own approval), the /devflow:docs suite, /devflow:create-issue, plus the self-improving retrospective loop (/devflow:retrospective per-PR + /devflow:retrospective-audit weekly).

entry.title: gograph
entry.content: Local Go repository intelligence for Claude Code: AST-aware call graphs, impact, security-flow candidates, and 61 query and analysis capabilities via the gograph MCP server.

entry.title: loopcraft
entry.content: Loop engineering for Claude Code — rubric+verifier self-correction, 5-stage memory protocol (fail→investigate→verify→distill→consult), autonomous backlog runner

entry.title: atl
entry.content: Mirror, edit, validate, and push Confluence pages and Jira issues with the atl CLI

entry.title: yggdrasil
entry.content: One shared, durable memory for your AI coding agents — local-first, zero-dependency. Decisions, lessons and status persist across sessions, tools and projects.

entry.title: seahorse-vm-setup
entry.content: One-command setup for a fresh seahorse GPU dev VM. Installs pixi + tooling, authenticates GitHub via browser device flow and AWS via SSO (no pasted secrets), clones seahorse, and runs the tested setup_vm.sh.

entry.title: yana-ai
entry.content: Personal agent operating system for Claude Code. Safety hooks, memory tiers, agents, commands, and cross-engine hard enforcement.

entry.title: googlenews-mcp
entry.content: googlenews-mcp

entry.title: server-monitor-mcp
entry.content: server-monitor-mcp

entry.title: FableCut
entry.content: FableCut

entry.title: vs
entry.content: Plan-to-ship workflow skills for shaping ideas, building autonomously, reviewing code, and shipping PRs with agent discipline.

entry.title: aaron-marketing
entry.content: 120 marketing skills and 8 commands as a four-layer operating system: Narrative strategy; SEO/GEO, Organic Social, Email, Paid Ads, and Influencer channels; Product Launch orchestration; and a Protocol layer with seven append-only truth registries plus non-canonical working memory. Eight typed advisory frameworks (TALE, CORE-EEAT, CITE, STAR, ECHO, SEND, ROAS, RAMP) use machine-checkable auditor artifacts and immutable standalone runtime contracts. Keyless-first and zero-dependency.

entry.title: agentcomm
entry.content: Multi-agent mailbox CLI — any git remote is a bus (git+ssh/github/sqlite/s3/gcs/postgres). register/send/inbox/wait/claim/log/channels so Claude coordinates with other agents or sessions; auto-selects the repo bus inside a git repo.

entry.title: tl-telar
entry.content: Agentic engineering framework for cross-platform apps: mobile (React Native, Flutter), web (Astro, Next.js, TanStack), Rust services, and desktop - 48 agents, 122 skills, 24 commands, 4 hooks, 7 rules, 29 scripts

entry.title: plan-runner
entry.content: Take a Markdown implementation plan, run it through a parallel agent swarm with per-wave verification, and generate a bug-fix plan for re-runs; TDD red-green mode on by default (--no-tdd to disable) with per-task red/green gate evidence; auto-detects Claude Code Agent Teams for token-lean orchestration with a subagent fallback. Tallies best-effort token usage for every dispatched subagent (analyzer, dev agents, verifiers, aggregator) into manifest.json token_usage with a grand total and honest coverage counters, surfaced in dashboards, an end-of-run per-phase Token Report with top consumers, and the PR stats; when the harness surfaces no usage figure for a subagent, each agent's own token_usage self-report (the last in-band harness figure, never an estimate) is used as a labeled lower-bound fallback. On the teams backend each wave is verifier-gated: the lead waits on the verifier's actual task result (never self-verifies) and a coverage gate before aggregation backfills any missing verdict, so a PR cannot open while a verifier is still outstanding. git is optional: when absent (no binary or not a repo) all git operations are skipped. Before opening the PR, syncs a code-atlas architecture index (runs /code-atlas:update when .code-atlas/ is present) so the index reflects what was implemented. Verification coverage is configurable via a .plan-runner.yml verify_mode (per-agent | per-wave | last-wave-only) or a --verify flag; lower modes verify fewer waves, record the rest as SKIPPED (distinct from UNVERIFIABLE), and force a draft PR with a banner. Final step opens or updates a proper PR via the plan-runner:pr skill (conventional title, rich body, draft when bugs remain).

entry.title: sprout
entry.content: Connect your AI agent to the Sprout MCP — author kid canvases and manage your family (tasks, gems, rewards, screen-time), plus bundled Sprout planning skills and the knowledge/design/examples docs they load.

entry.title: agent-kernel
entry.content: Local-first governance kernel for AI coding agents — shared memory, architecture conformance, rule distribution, approval inbox, episodic memory archive, MCP tools, hooks, and deterministic policy guards.

entry.title: daimon
entry.content: Dream-briefing for AI coding agents: a cognitive checkpoint at session end, a 'while you were away' briefing at session start.

entry.title: plot
entry.content: Git-native planning workflow for software development — idea, approve, deliver, release

entry.title: macaron
entry.content: Macaron artifacts for Claude Code and Codex — streaming GenUI builder, model switcher, and visual session manager.

entry.title: moszoro-skills
entry.content: Maciej Moszoro's personal Claude Code skills — verification-phase, qa-phase, cove, eli5, pixel-perfect-svg.

entry.title: ai-mentor
entry.content: Learn the Claude Code capabilities you didn't know existed. A discovery mentor that reads your setup, remembers what you already use, and teaches your highest-leverage gap — one demonstrated move at a time, grounded in your repo, never repeating itself.

entry.title: time-mcp
entry.content: Time/timer/alarm MCP server + /time command

entry.title: kshana
entry.content: Run the validated Kshana PNT-resilience engine from an AI agent — SGP4/SDP4, IAU frames, GNSS availability/DOP/ARAIM, Allan/MTIE timing, GNSS-INS fusion and quantum-sensor models. The agent calls the real, externally-validated engine instead of guessing the math. Requires the kshana-mcp server on PATH (cargo install kshana-mcp) or Docker.

entry.title: fns-build-factory
entry.content: FNS Build Factory — a complete client-acquisition build system: websites (Site Factory), funnels (Funnel Builder), cold email (Email Sequence Writer), GHL automation (GHL Workflow Generator), and full apps (Build Factory). Wired to the Parts Factory component MCP.

entry.title: solution-harness-plugin
entry.content: 앱팀 공통 harness-engineering 워크플로우 플러그인 V2 (Android / iOS) — 계획→TDD→검증→bug-fix 닫힌 루프

entry.title: tfstackplan
entry.content: tfstackplan CLI helper extension for managing Terraform state operations, plan visibility, and agentic workflows

entry.title: caliber-analysis
entry.content: Analyzes how your team uses Claude Code. Captures session activity — prompts, responses, and tool use — with secrets redacted on your machine before anything is sent, then ships it to your Caliber tenant for AI-governance insights. Bearer-authenticated, idempotent, and non-blocking.

entry.title: canon-core
entry.content: Always-on portable engineering rules (universal + Python tiers). A SessionStart hook injects the bundled rule modules into every session and warns loudly when a required module is missing.

entry.title: sdpm
entry.content: Spec-driven PowerPoint generation with a compose sub-agent (Claude Code).

entry.title: ai-handoff
entry.content: Automatic, integrity-checked handoff and verified memory recall between Claude Code and Codex.

entry.title: ai-employee-builder
entry.content: Public AI Employee Builder shell: auto-routing skill stubs + proactive hooks that connect buyers to the gated AIEB MCP server.

entry.title: gsd-core
entry.content: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entry.title: jedymatt-skills
entry.content: jedymatt's personal Claude Code skills: coding-principles, architecting-principles, detecting-code-smells, git-town (with PR stacking), handoff/load-handoff, and writing-plain-english.

entry.title: myharness
entry.content: The team-architecture factory for Claude Code and Codex — a meta-skill that turns a domain description into an agent team and the skills they use, with six team patterns (Pipeline, Fan-out/Fan-in, Expert Pool, Producer-Reviewer, Supervisor, Hierarchical Delegation), a two-layer quality gate (internal QA + external codex/agy review), TDD/dev-rules doctrine injection, risk-tiered gates, and dual-runtime output (Claude Code + Codex). Claude Code·Codex용 팀 아키텍처 팩토리: 도메인 한 문장을 에이전트 팀+스킬로 변환하고, 내부 QA + 외부 리뷰 2층 게이트와 듀얼 런타임을 적용하는 메타 스킬.

entry.title: harness-kit
entry.content: A portable Claude Code engineering harness — plan → work → verify → feedback discipline as reusable agents, skills, and hooks, plus an `introspect` skill that tailors a .claude/ setup to any repo's tech stack.

entry.title: Titan
entry.content: Pensar, fazer e passar o bastão: cinco skills chamáveis individualmente. planejar (metodologia completa pra desenhar produto/software novo do zero antes de codar), auto-think (modo largar-e-esquecer pra ESTUDAR um problema difícil — pesquisa, estuda de vários ângulos, confronta os achados com o Codex, verifica e entrega uma ou mais soluções com veredito; não executa), auto-gptworker (modo largar-e-esquecer INVERTIDO: o Claude planeja/orquestra/revisa e o Codex é quem CONSTRÓI, mão na massa; borda sensível o Claude assume e para até autorização), handoff (gera documento de passagem de bastão pra continuar o trabalho numa sessão nova do zero) e gpt-optimizer (revisor adversarial on-demand via Codex GPT-5.6 que te faz refletir sobre uma decisão no meio da conversa — o GPT tenta derrubar, advogado do diabo; sem precisar de plano, PR ou código formal; quando o veredito é Seguir, oferece executar com a auto-gptworker). A auto-think estuda e recomenda; quem executa a solução escolhida é a auto-gptworker (Codex constrói, Claude revisa o diff). A planejar pode, no fim, oferecer disparar a auto-gptworker pra executar o plano — opcional, nunca automático. Repo-agnóstico — serve pra qualquer projeto.

entry.title: astrale
entry.content: Astrale CLI.

entry.title: agent-harness
entry.content: Portable AI agent harness — curated review/build/test agents, secret-hardening + worktree + plan-gate hooks, and spec/supervise/wrap/verify-completion skills. Install once, use in every project. AI-agnostic core (Claude Code / Codex / Gemini).

entry.title: llm-ux-benchmark
entry.content: Verilen siteyi sıfırdan vanilla static (HTML/CSS/JS) olarak yeniden kodlatır; Codex 0-100 puanlar (Teknik kalite / UI / Kod okunabilirliği), PageSpeed manuel girilir.

entry.title: somi
entry.content: Multi-agent engineering workflow system: plan, code, review — with SOLID/OWASP guardrails, deterministic hooks, and a global ruleset.

entry.title: spec
entry.content: Spec-driven development plugin: research → ask → propose → HARD GATE → apply → verify → archive, enforced by 4 hooks (TBD scan / approval gate / archive audit / verify reminder), with scope-dispatched dev agents and a fresh-context verifier agent

entry.title: audiobook-organizer
entry.content: Expert Claude Code assistance for the audiobook-organizer codebase — shared context loading, Go/DB/docs/PII specialist agents.

entry.title: swiftui
entry.content: Real production SwiftUI usage from 1,857 shipping macOS apps PLUS 33 macOS-SwiftUI skills (28 domain audits + write/modernize/scaffold) — all backed by the swiftui-ctx CLI. Look up how an API is really used and the consensus argument shape, flag deprecated calls, scaffold whole patterns, and run domain audits (accessibility, concurrency, state/observation, liquid glass, navigation, nativeness, and more) that ground every finding in real code with GitHub permalinks. Use before writing, reviewing, modernizing, or auditing SwiftUI on macOS.

entry.title: flywheel
entry.content: Pragmatic Growth workflow skills for Claude Code — define-goal (plain-language wants → measurable, red-teamed goal contracts), dispatch (one-goal-per-run orchestrator on the current branch with TDD-backed checks and a local build+test gate behind an independent second-view review), goals-status (read-only view of the open docs/goals queue), loop-architect (autonomous loop contracts), factory-doctor (one-pass preflight/doctor), and telegram-message (dispatch-gated Telegram DMs when a run errors, waits, or finishes). Ships three tool-restricted read-only subagents for the factory's review roles: gate-reviewer, fresh-check, and contract-red-team.

entry.title: governed-second-brain
entry.content: Bob's Big Brain — the governed team brain: cited recall, hash-chained receipts. ONE plugin, two modes. Local (default): turn your own files into cited (qmd://) memory with deterministic governance and a tamper-evident SHA-256 hash-chained audit trail, in-process with no runtime network after one-time native dependency provisioning. Team (set TEAMKB_API_URL): query your team's single governed brain over the tailnet with a per-user token.

entry.title: feature-forge
entry.content: End-to-end feature development pipeline: PRD → tech spec → implementation specs → backlog → documentation, with verification gates, pipeline state tracking, and specialized subagents for verification and codebase research.

entry.title: musicbrainz-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for MusicBrainz — search/browse music metadata, cover art, and submit tags, ratings, and collections

entry.title: devkit
entry.content: Local-dev coordination skills for devkit: file locks, ports, dev servers, issue lifecycle

entry.title: hermes-tweet
entry.content: Native Hermes Agent X/Twitter plugin for Xquik automation with read-first workflows and approval-gated actions. Not affiliated with X Corp.

entry.title: preludium-skills
entry.content: Personal skill library - curated Claude Code skills for compressed communication, code review, and development workflows.

entry.title: sidecar
entry.content: Project-agnostic AI coding sidecar — SELF-CONTAINED Claude Code plugin: governance hooks (guards + injects) AND the sidecar CLI itself (bin/ · cli/ · lib/ · modules/ · config/ · templates/ · styles/) ship as ONE unit. Hooks run the plugin's own bundled CLI via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, so `/plugin update` + reload refreshes everything together — no per-project copy, no separate `sidecar self-update`. Slash commands ship as BARE `/cmd` via `sidecar shadow` (user-scope ~/.claude/commands), NOT plugin-namespaced — see `commands: []` below. Falls back to a global `sidecar` on PATH when present.

entry.title: beads-superpowers
entry.content: Superpowers skills + Beads issue tracking for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and 6 more AI coding agents. Composable skills + persistent task memory.

entry.title: embedded-debugger
entry.content: Embedded debugger workflow for probe-rs targets. Provides a CLI-first skill and optional MCP server for probe discovery, target checks, flashing, memory access, and RTT workflows.

entry.title: ai-agent-toolkit
entry.content: Source-first AI-agent toolkit with native Claude Code plugin metadata, English setup routing, Windows-safe hook repair, opt-in repo auto-update, and local bridge adapters.

entry.title: open-agent-hub
entry.content: Unified capability management center for Skills, Agents, and Commands.

entry.title: vibo-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for Vibo (vibodj.com) — plan & manage event music, song requests, ideas, guests, and playlists via natural language

entry.title: tim-skills
entry.content: Portable agent skills for engineering, research, teaching, and knowledge-base workflows.

entry.title: codeops
entry.content: Universal AI-development workflow: planning, requirements engineering, reverse-engineering, disambiguation, preflight audits, architecture docs, roadmaps, upgrades, and git commit flows. Ported from codeops-mcp.

entry.title: draft
entry.content: Context-Driven Development: draft specs and plans before implementation. Structured workflows for features and fixes.

entry.title: Groundwork
entry.content: Groundwork

entry.content: proodos

entry.content: Session Handoff MCP

entry.content: tardigrade-shield

entry.title: cron-mcp
entry.content: cron-mcp

entry.content: mstodo

entry.content: peering-manager-mcp-server

entry.content: CalDAV MCP Server

entry.content: @modootoday/datalab-extension-mcp

entry.content: zotero-api-mcp

entry.content: packagerating MCP Server

entry.content: Cherry Studio Knowledge Base MCP Server

entry.content: MCP Codebase Server

entry.title: InvoiceFlash MCP

entry.title: Feishu MCP Server

entry.content: portal-api

entry.title: MCP-ADT
entry.content: MCP-ADT

entry.title: SinoConnection eSIM
entry.content: SinoConnection eSIM

entry.title: SoupNet-oss
entry.content: SoupNet-oss

entry.title: cybersec-toolkit
entry.content: 872 on-demand security skills for CTF, pentest, bug bounty, DFIR, detection engineering, cloud, identity, and red/blue team work. Skills are plain Markdown and activate by task without permanently consuming context. Bundles vendored skills under mixed licenses (MIT, Apache-2.0, CC-BY-SA-4.0) — see per-source attribution in .claude/skills/SKILLS.md.

entry.title: rebeca-elmudesi
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Rebeca Elmudesi — branded presentations and documents about her art via stromy-format, plus self-service website and brand asset editing via asset-broker

entry.title: gsd-core
entry.content: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entry.title: modjo-cli
entry.content: Helps agents drive the modjo CLI efficiently: correct flags, the numeric-id-vs-name filter gotcha, and --json/--jq idioms for querying calls, deals, accounts, contacts, users, and teams.

entry.title: qrspi
entry.content: QRSPI — an eight-stage spec-driven workflow (Questions, Research, Design, Structure, Slices, Plan, Implement, PR) layered on OpenSpec. Ships the /qrspi:* commands, seven stage subagents, and the supporting skills.

entry.title: mpt-extension-skills
entry.content: SoftwareOne MPT extension SDLC skills: Jira work items, branching, commits, pull requests, review feedback, documentation, dependency policy, and release workflows.

entry.title: ltspice-mcp
entry.content: LTspice/ngspice circuit simulation with structured results — including per-device operating points (gm/gds/vth) read back by name, no rawfile parsing — plus LTspice .asc schematic editing, exposed as MCP tools. Tracks the latest ltspice-mcp release on PyPI.

entry.title: sodax-skills
entry.content: sodax-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: gitmark
entry.content: OntoShip — ontology-driven docs that ship: a md+git knowledge base (FTS5 search, HTML graph, ontology linter) plus the spec-driven dev-flow built on it. CLI/plugin: gitmark.

entry.title: plan-build-verify
entry.content: Spec-driven, test-first agentic development pipeline: isolated spec review, a cross-family fidelity gate, locked RED tests, and mutation + adversarial verification.

entry.title: conduct-cli
entry.content: Conduct AI CLI — run agents, manage workspaces, and enforce AI usage policies with ConductGuard MCP. Includes conduct, conductguard-mcp, and conduct-mcp binaries.

entry.title: pyright-lsp-python
entry.content: Python LSP integration with Pyright for AI-assisted code navigation

entry.title: gobbler
entry.content: Convert YouTube videos, web pages, documents, and audio to markdown. Control browsers via extension for NotebookLM, ChatGPT, Claude.ai, and Gemini.

entry.title: godot
entry.content: Bundle of Godot 4 skills (C# and GDScript both first-class): GDScript web/mobile export and portrait-pet conventions, engine quirks, UI authoring, version-aware API lookup, asset generation, scaffolding, scene building, and headless visual QA.

entry.title: tw
entry.content: Traceway skills: /tw:traceway debugs production issues through the traceway CLI, /tw:traceway-setup instruments a project to report to a Traceway instance.

entry.title: doc-mirror
entry.content: The doc-mirror claude system: a 1:1 documentation mirror of any codebase, maintained by an invariant doc-mirror STATE MACHINE (per-module doc(m), 6 context/ index files, fork-on-change, no random documents). Bundles doc-mirror-boot (entry + core-loop prime + router), the doc-mirror-{init,seework,change,prompts} state-skills, doc-mirror-install (the host-setup WIZARD), ship-a-plugin (the build+distribute dev-flow), doc-mirror (THE LAW), and make-ai-operating-system (the architect for new systems of this class); the brainhook work-loop + session-start + transition-guard + readonly-guard hooks (plugin-native via CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT); the journal/projects/vision/plan/tracker/commit/cursor + docmirror-search CLI tools; and the doc-mirror law + behavior rules.

entry.title: networked-thinking-skills
entry.content: Agent Skills for Networked Thinking atomic notes in Obsidian vaults.

entry.title: canvas-toolbox
entry.content: FERPA-safe AI-assisted Canvas LMS toolkit. Agent specs cover course audits (rubric coverage / quality, syllabus, CLO quality, alignment chain, accessibility, workload, grading structure / load, formative variety, learning model), Canvas sync paths (course / blueprint / Page-level orphan cleanup), and a generic LLM-grading pipeline (de-identify → consensus → reconcile → push). Knowledge files cover Canvas API + lessons learned, rubrics, assessments, backwards design, cognitive load theory, Hattie 3-phase, Merrill's First Principles, BYU-I Learning Model, BYUI Course Design Standards, and 14+ other pedagogical frameworks. Brain-agnostic by design: the LLM provider is your choice.

entry.title: comment-io
entry.content: Comment.io skills, an engineering delivery workflow (plan, prototype, build, review, ship) over a live Comment.io worklog, botlet workspaces, and CLI notification checks for Claude Code

entry.title: c4bc
entry.content: Delt bundt af Business Central-kommandoer (website-build, website-create-css, website-init, website-update-index, website-github-init-deploy, pdf-build, website-implement-language-selector, al-update-translations, al-sort-usings, al-userdocs, al-techdocs) + html-guide-designsystem til Claude Code.

entry.title: darkmatter-skills
entry.content: Darkmatter's team-wide shared skills catalog, auto-discovered from skills/.

entry.title: mighty-powers
entry.content: Unified Claude Code plugin for full-lifecycle software development — combining the best of Superpowers, Ultraship, and BMAD Method. 56 skills, 22 tools, 6 agents, 34 commands.

entry.title: mix
entry.content: Mix Flutter styling framework guidance for agents working on Mix code, projects using package:mix, and the Mix monorepo.

entry.title: reassign
entry.content: Plan and review your day on Reassign's circular 24-hour calendar, with ADHD-friendly scheduling methods. Bundles the Reassign scheduling skill and connects to the Reassign MCP.

entry.title: oats-skills
entry.content: Vue, Tauri, architecture, security, and MCP-debugging skills tailored to the oats desktop app.

entry.title: portaljs
entry.content: Agentic skills for building PortalJS data portals — recommend an architecture, scaffold a portal, add datasets, charts, and maps, connect a CKAN backend, deploy, and audit data quality.

entry.title: t-tools
entry.content: DDD-driven development skills, sub-agents and workflow commands for Rust, React, miniapp, and Flutter projects

entry.title: waystone
entry.content: SSOT-anchored agentic development workflow harness: Socratic project ideation that forges the north-star SSOT, one-click project setup, a structured task-registry CLI (read/mutate/archive without slurping the file) with a global naming convention, zero-token roadmap rendering, round closeout, a per-round markdown review request for an external reviewer that reads the repo over git, verbatim review ingestion (plus an optional SHA-bound PR review-cycle merge gate), /improve: an advisory report mined from your actual Claude Code session history and review evidence — deterministic trace/audit with provenance-labeled facts, recommendations you accept or reject (recorded, never auto-applied) — and waystone delegate: deterministic external delegation (immutable dirty-tree snapshot base, dedicated worktrees, reproducible env prep, codex-backed runner, structured artifact contracts, independent codex-companion verification on the same base) plus project-local adaptive overlays with shadow replay, non-blocking boundary warnings, evidence projection, and a runtime-injected main operating contract.

entry.title: agents-library
entry.content: Seven orchestrator skills — /review-pr, /review-design, /review-ux-psychology, /batch-merge-prs, /triage-issues, /simplify-sweep, and /describe-codebase — plus a set of stack-agnostic, single-purpose coding subagents: architecture, dead code, docs, refactor, security, tests, UX polish, and visual design.

entry.title: ai-brain-starter
entry.content: Set up or upgrade an AI-powered Obsidian vault with journaling, knowledge graphs, pattern recognition, and meeting workflows. Includes skills for daily journaling, weekly insights, graphify knowledge graphs, humanizer, and more.

entry.title: guttew-skills
entry.content: guttew-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: pmcontext
entry.content: PM-Claude workflow — tiered planning and execution (quick/standard/full), phase gate enforcement, session tracking. Commands: init, start, quick, plan, execute, resume, close, status. Backed by Supabase.

entry.title: miller
entry.content: Local SQLite-backed code intelligence, content search, and workspace freshness for coding agents. Requires Node.js on PATH (the plugin launcher is a Node script).

entry.title: cinematic-scroll
entry.content: Build cinematic, scroll-driven websites — pinned chapter reveals, multi-depth parallax, 3D tilt, environment-morphing backgrounds, and full release/launch pages. The motion grammar is the skill; the aesthetic is always the user's. Single self-contained scroll sections (Mode A) or a full Next.js release site with GSAP/Lenis + AI-generated visuals (Mode B), via a 5-phase gated pipeline with taste guardrails, 12 scroll patterns, and a transform/opacity performance budget.

entry.title: builder-ai
entry.content: AI product quality enforcement: 8 skills and 5 agents for LLM product teams

entry.title: vatt-ghern
entry.content: Daily tech news skill for the vatt-ghern public blog (Eleventy + Cloudflare Pages). Drafts one roundup + several deep-story HTML posts per day, opens a PR for review.

entry.title: esupgrade
entry.content: Auto-upgrade JavaScript and TypeScript syntax to new ECMAScript features based on browser support.

entry.title: surreal-memory
entry.content: Reflex-based memory system for AI agents with SurrealDB backend — stores experiences as interconnected neurons and recalls them through spreading activation, mimicking how the human brain works.

entry.title: team-skills-platform
entry.content: Role-based Team Skills platform with an ECC-style harness skeleton, specialist agents, layered rules, commands, hooks skeleton, and frontend governance.

entry.title: claude-dev-skills
entry.content: Personal dev skills: git workflows, code review, project setup, productivity

entry.title: factory
entry.content: Autonomous coding pipeline: converts GitHub PRD issues into merged pull requests with quality-first review gates

entry.title: issue-loop
entry.content: GitHub Issue ベースの自動開発ループ。Issue を自動選定し、実装・レビュー・PR 作成をループし続ける

entry.title: apple-photos
entry.content: Query and export from the macOS Apple Photos library via osxphotos - search by date/album/keyword/person, list albums and folders, fetch metadata, export originals or edited photos, and (opt-in via APPLE_PHOTOS_MCP_ENABLE_WRITES=1) organize albums and set titles/keywords/favorites (macOS only)

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: obsidian
entry.content: Create and edit Obsidian vault files including Markdown, Bases, and Canvas. Use when working with .md, .base, or .canvas files in an Obsidian vault.

entry.title: awow
entry.content: Set up or extend awow in any repo, new or existing. /awowify adds the files Claude Code or GitHub Copilot need to follow your issue board (Linear, Jira, GitHub Issues, Azure DevOps) and conventions — without overwriting what's already there — then walks you through configuring it.

entry.title: axhub
entry.content: axhub 앱을 만들고 배포하는 Claude Code plugin이에요. 8개 스킬(onboarding/bootstrap/deploy/import/development/diagnosis/clarity/update)이 ax-hub-cli(v0.20.0+)를 직접 호출해 preview-confirm 배포와 verify 기반 성공 선언을 따라요.

entry.title: wb-plc
entry.content: Wiren Board controller skills — operate, configure, troubleshoot WB hardware via SSH and wb-cli.

entry.title: review-council
entry.content: Multi-agent code review for Claude Code. Multiple AI models review your PR, code, or plan independently; a cross-family refutation pass and an active judge then distill the findings into a curated, severity-ranked list of what actually needs changing.

entry.title: codex-delegate
entry.content: Hand token-heavy mechanical work (batch edits, scaffolding, refactors, test generation, plotting scripts) from Claude to Codex CLI.

entry.title: apple-pim
entry.content: Native macOS integration for Calendar, Reminders, Contacts, and Mail using EventKit, Contacts, and JXA frameworks

entry.title: claude-ads
entry.content: Multi-host paid advertising audit & optimization skill conforming to the Agent Skills open standard. Verified on Claude Code; experimental on Codex CLI, Cursor, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, Goose. 250+ checks across Google, Meta, YouTube, LinkedIn, TikTok, Microsoft, Apple & Amazon Ads with weighted scoring, parallel agents, 12 industry templates, AI creative generation, PPC math, A/B test design, PDF reports, attribution + server-side tracking deep dives, and a 41-test pytest eval harness.

entry.title: ljg-skills
entry.content: LJG's personal Claude Code skills collection - paper reading, content casting, writing tools

entry.title: n8n-mcp-skills
entry.content: Expert skills for building n8n workflows with n8n-mcp, with a hooks enforcement layer

entry.title: codspeed
entry.content: CodSpeed plugin for Claude Code helping with performance measurement and optimization.

entry.title: scholaraio
entry.content: A research infrastructure for AI agents. Search, read, and analyze papers from your local knowledge base while coding. Includes arXiv discovery, layered reading, ingestion, topic modeling, citation graphs, insights analytics, Office document inspection, scientific tool docs, and academic writing workflows. Requires Python 3.10+ and pip install.

entry.title: arc-devtools-mcp
entry.content: Reliable automation, in-depth debugging, and performance analysis in Arc browser using Chrome DevTools and Puppeteer

entry.title: lope
entry.content: Multi-CLI validator ensemble for AI work. Any AI CLI implements, any AI CLI validates. Sprint modes, single-shot review/ask/vote/compare/pipe, flow graphs, gates, memory, deliberation, team management, and self-update. 15 built-in CLI adapters plus custom providers. Works for engineering, business, and research.

entry.title: bench
entry.content: peerbench — a panel of AI reviewers (Codex + Kimi + GLM + Qwen + MiMo) for Claude Code: automatic gating reviews (plans, code turns, pushes), agentic read-only code review, and on-demand bug hunts. Commands are /bench:*.

entry.title: kratos
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestrator for features, research, and project insights

entry.title: genius-skills
entry.content: Personal agent skills for PR review, commits, debugging, and more

entry.title: roo-oliv-skills
entry.content: Portable, config-driven engineering skills: a refine → deep-plan → implement → review-fix-loop pipeline, deep-review, and setup/bootstrap. Each reads docs/agents/skills-config.md so it adapts per repo.

entry.title: seeks
entry.content: Self-running, verifier-gated loops with durable .seeks/ state and native worktrees.

entry.title: personal
entry.content: Personal Claude Code skills

entry.title: Overture Maps
entry.content: Building footprint data from Overture Maps — geocode addresses and query 2.5B global building polygons with height, class, floor count, and GeoJSON geometry.

entry.title: ingrain-security
entry.content: Threat assessment for coding agents when planning implementation.

entry.title: dwe
entry.content: Navigator skill for DWE projects — a Docker-based developer environment manager. Activates when working in a project containing `workspace.yml`.

entry.title: autoharness
entry.content: Per-symbol maintenance optimizer for an agent's skill layer — learns skills from real runs and keeps them by adherence in use, not by an offline eval score.

entry.title: savvly
entry.content: Explore Savvly MCP: retirement projections, eligibility, comparisons, and FAQs for an SEC-registered fund that pairs full market upside with later-life longevity payouts.

entry.title: schedule-reminder
entry.content: Persistent store for todos, events, deadlines and progress with pending/doing/done states; fires due reminders via Discord; stable CLI/JSON API other skills call.

entry.title: dcik
entry.content: DCIK — Dorsolateral Contrary Inference Katabasis. Two tools: a 178-perspective adversarial analysis skill, and /decide — a cross-model Decision Interview that turns a genuinely different model loose on YOUR reasoning for high-stakes calls. See eval/ for the honest evidence on what each does and doesn't do.

entry.title: tdoc
entry.content: Prompt-native interactive HTML docs — open-source community implementation of Jesse Pollak's bdocs idea. Generate self-contained HTML from a prompt, comment on text + artifacts, publish to your own Cloudflare Worker for free always-on sharing.

entry.title: cc-reload
entry.content: Session continuity across context resets for Claude Code. Snapshots a session digest before /clear, /compact, or auto-compaction and auto-rehydrates it after. The non-looped companion to cc-repete — stands down whenever a cc-repete loop is active.

entry.title: second-opinion
entry.content: Interrogates the decisions behind AI-written code, not just its correctness: whether this was the right path, whether the business logic is sound, and what it will cost to own. Produces a decision review for a human, or a machine-readable verdict for an approving agent.

entry.title: energy-star-pm
entry.content: EPA ENERGY STAR Portfolio Manager — retrieve scores, EUI benchmarks, carbon estimates. Share your properties with api@soapbox.build to connect.

entry.title: phovia
entry.content: Phovia memory hooks and local MCP search for Claude Code, with device login.

entry.title: laicluse-agent-fieldkit-marketplace
entry.content: Marketplace metadata for l'Aicluse Agent Fieldkit

entry.title: hmd
entry.content: Nothing ships unproven. Heimdall is an autonomous multi-agent orchestrator for Claude Code that turns one prompt into a finished project — and keeps moving the bar on what counts as done: every plan wires an external, falsifiable oracle so the implementation can never grade its own homework, and the merge stays blocked until the work is proven correct. Decomposes work, spawns parallel agents, enforces quality gates with CTO-level judgment. Live observability via a terminal-native HUD statusline and end-of-run summary card.

entry.title: todos
entry.content: Per-project todo tracking with a relational project-knowledge brain — decisions, business rules, contradictions, stakeholders, scope changes — and a local broadsheet dashboard at localhost:5757. Plan, sync, build, design, and close out implementation work; capture decisions/rules/contradictions to remember later.

entry.title: arc-1
entry.content: SAP ABAP development for Claude Code: bundles the ARC-1 MCP server (read/write/search/activate/lint/diagnose ABAP via the ADT REST API) with best-practice skills for RAP services, CDS modelling, ABAP Unit tests, clean-core audits, and UI5 modernization. Read-only by default; opt-in write gates.

entry.title: superior-skills
entry.content: Agent-native trading skills for Superior Trade — onboard with an API key, then backtest and deploy v2 Hyperliquid/Aerodrome and v3 Polymarket/Lighter strategies. Skills load from the skills/ directory.

entry.title: biotope
entry.content: Croissant-driven knowledge-graph construction (BioCypher ecosystem).

entry.title: dev-workflow
entry.content: A general spec-driven software development workflow for Claude Code: detect project domain/conventions, research, weigh solution options, plan, implement in reviewed phases (code review every phase; a security scan whenever a phase touches a sensitive surface), and run a final cross-phase security audit. Stops for user approval at every checkpoint. Domain-agnostic — reads conventions from the project or infers them from the feature.

entry.title: plumb-line
entry.content: Give any repository the discipline of epistemic honesty enforced by tooling: a clear source-truth layer, visible uncertainty, quarantined fakery, reproducible outputs, and rules enforced by machines rather than goodwill. New here? Run plumb-line-method first to get oriented — it teaches the discipline, then hands you into setup.

entry.title: supered
entry.content: Set up and manage a Supered environment with Claude. Connects the Supered MCP, then guides creating collections, content, guides, page triggers, process boards, sync-engine rules/rulesets, and action plans — following Supered best practices.

entry.title: cairn
entry.content: Milestone-driven development workflow — discuss goals, define milestones, derive and complete tasks, and archive milestones

entry.title: 8colors-process-engine
entry.content: Portable Claude Code process engine — 21 agents, 10 commands, 2 session skills, cross-platform schedulers, multi-provider RAG with FTS5 hybrid retrieval, deterministic quality/security gates, and A6 SaaS domain modules (auth + tenancy + api-credentials + billing). Enforcement is deterministic, not prompt-hope.

entry.title: bedrock-limiter
entry.content: Claude Code の Bedrock 利用コストを日次・月次で制限するプラグイン

entry.title: forgedock
entry.content: Autonomous AI development pipeline that uses GitHub as a structured knowledge graph for Claude Code agents. Adds /work-on, /review-pr, /quality-gate, /orchestrate, and 20+ pipeline commands.

entry.title: braintrust
entry.content: Turn your scattered user research into an evidence-graded running analysis, then pressure-test product ideas against it. braintrust-setup finds where your user knowledge lives; braintrust-ingest copies sources into a project-local braintrust/ store and grades every claim usable / borderline / discount with a calibrated Mom Test lens, flagging where the judge is unsure and where weak signals converge across segments so you can judge them in context; braintrust-ask judges whether users actually want an idea, citing specific quotes, provenance, and gaps. Zero backend; runs entirely in your Claude Code session.

entry.title: promotion-assistant
entry.content: Automate multi-channel product promotion (email/posts/forum/DM), track conversion funnel, self-tune via feedback.

entry.title: kagura-cli
entry.content: Thin Claude Code skills over the Kagura Memory CLI (kagura): doctor, auth, setup, document ingestion, resource tokens, R2 file uploads, and zero-knowledge secrets.

entry.title: joust-engine
entry.content: Run a Joust Engine tournament in one of two modes. Single pass: produce N independent solutions in parallel, then a blind Opus reviewer scores them, lists pros and cons, ranks them, and names a winner. Two pass: the same first round, but the Opus reviewer also distils what worked and what failed into guidance; the losing attempts are discarded, a second round of N fresh attempts is run with that guidance (positives to emulate, pitfalls to avoid), the saved round one winner is added back, and a final Opus ranker picks the overall winner. First ask the user which model to use for the attempts: Anthropic Opus/Sonnet/Haiku, a GLM z.ai model (glm-5.2/glm-5.1/glm-4.7/glm-4.5-air, run via the glm CLI), a local on-device MLX model (free, via the omlx server; list is dynamic), an OpenAI model via the codex exec CLI (gpt-5.5, pick a reasoning effort), a MiniMax M-series model (minimax-m3 via the MiniMax endpoint), an xAI Grok model (grok-build or grok-composer-2.5-fast, run via the grok CLI), Top Mixed (an even split across opus/glm-5.2/codex-high), or Mixed per-attempt; the blind reviewer/ranker is always Anthropic Opus. Trigger on the sigil @@JE[:N][:M[:Z]] (e.g. @@JE:5, @@JE:5:2, bare @@JE) or the prose marker 'joust:N[:M[:Z]]', case-insensitive with optional spaces. N (attempts/round) is optional and may be inferred from a prose model spec like '2 opus, 2 glm 5.2, 1 codex high' or the Top Mixed preset; M = passes (1 single, 2 two); Z = grand loops: Z=1 (or omitted) is the isolated tournament, Z>=2 (capped at Z_MAX=5) runs an UNATTENDED chain that per loop runs a tournament, implements the winning proposal into your real repo on a new JE-<loop>-<random7> branch via the Opus joust-implementer agent, runs fail-closed verify, and opens one PR (draft+needs-human on failure) — never auto-merged. E.g. 'do abc :joust:5' or 'do abc @@JE:5:2'. A bundled joust-cleanup agent (ASK-FIRST, dry-run by default) reclaims local disk from JE run artifacts, repoMode worktrees, and already-merged JE-* branches when you ask. Per-attempt turn caps and timeouts scale to task size (short/medium/long), auto-estimated and overridable next to the marker. A separate @@FE[:N] sigil (Fable Engine, bundled fable-engine skill) runs the fast composer variant: one wide blind round via the engine's composeOnly mode, then the orchestrating model composes the best composite plan with per-candidate credit and implements it with tests — no councils; @@JE stays the calibration baseline.

entry.title: learn-with-coursera
entry.content: Turn any learning intent into a personalized Coursera experience. Asks three quick questions (topic, familiarity, preferred format), searches Coursera's catalog, and delivers the right next step — a course, hands-on project, short video, or live roleplay — then maps a path forward. Requires the Coursera connector for catalog tools.
